'''鈭歱-y-b-w''' ('''kapaybewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:breadpill|breadpill]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:breadpill|breadpill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-y-b-w
|-
! Lemma
| kapaybewoko
|}
